message:
test(engine): add 10 integration test suites for new modules and gates

New integration test files exercising cross-module interactions:

- controller_composition_matrix_integration.rs: Matrix composition
  with live engine pipelines
- frx_end_to_end_scenario_matrix.rs: Full scenario matrix covering
  all FRX execution paths
- frx_lockstep_oracle.rs: Oracle synchronization under concurrent
  engine instances
- frx_ssr_hydration_rsc_compatibility_strategy.rs: SSR/hydration/RSC
  compatibility verification across React framework versions
- global_coherence_checker_integration.rs: Cross-module coherence
  with intentional inconsistency injection
- obstruction_certificate_integration.rs: Certificate generation
  and validation for obstructed operations
- parser_performance_promotion_gate.rs: Parser perf gate with
  real corpus benchmarks
- semantic_transport_ledger_integration.rs: Ledger consistency
  under concurrent reads and writes
- static_analysis_graph_integration.rs: Graph construction from
  real crate source and query validation
- structural_causal_model_integration.rs: Causal inference with
  multi-variable interventions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
